design_system.rationale: The Document PiP child document copies --bg-ivory and --text-black from the opener and applies them via CSS variables.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on Google Chrome/Chromium 148 loaded http://localhost:3000/v130/document-picture-in-picture-add-option-to-ignore-window-bounds-cache/docpip-bounds/, filled requested width to 420 and height to 260, checked preferInitialWindowPlacement and disallowReturnToOpener, clicked Open DocPiP, verified the opened PiP body text reflected the requested options and resolved to rgb(253, 252, 248) background and rgb(0, 0, 0) text from copied --bg-ivory/--text-black tokens, then clicked Close DocPiP and confirmed currently open: no. Console had no messages, and all network requests completed with page/styles/fonts 200 and favicon 204.
